source_pr.title: *: use full sampling as default analyze
source_pr.body:
<!-- Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:

This pr change the default analyze tach to full sampling based one.

### What is changed and how it works?

Proposal: [xxx](url) <!-- REMOVE this line if not applicable -->

What's Changed:

Change the default analyze version. And fixing the unit-test changes.


### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

Side effects

- Performance regression
    - Consumes more CPU
    - Consumes more MEM
- Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note <!-- Please write a release note here to describe the change you made when it is released to the users of TiDB. If your PR doesn't involve any change to TiDB(like test enhancements, RFC proposals...), you can write `No release note`. -->

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky due to concurrency races or unsynchronized shared state. Asynchronous state transitions need polling/Eventually-style checks. This PR stabilizes it by: fix race.

evidence: files: cmd/explaintest/r/subquery.result, executor/analyze.go, executor/analyze_test.go, executor/builder.go, executor/show_stats_test.go, executor/simple_test.go, planner/core/cbo_test.go, planner/core/common_plans.go, planner/core/find_best_task.go, planner/core/integration_test.go, planner/core/planbuilder.go, planner/core/stats.go, planner/core/testdata/analyze_suite_out.json, planner/core/testdata/integration_suite_out.json, planner/core/testdata/stats_suite_out.json, sessionctx/variable/sysvar.go, sessionctx/variable/tidb_vars.go, statistics/builder.go, statistics/handle/ddl_test.go, statistics/handle/dump_test.go, statistics/handle/handle.go, statistics/handle/handle_test.go, statistics/handle/update.go, statistics/handle/update_test.go, statistics/histogram.go, statistics/integration_test.go, statistics/selectivity_test.go, statistics/testdata/stats_suite_out.json, util/ranger/testdata/ranger_suite_out.json, util/sqlexec/restricted_sql_executor.go
